---
title: "Harmonization Performance Visualization - Test"
output: html_document
---

# Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(gridExtra)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```

# Load Pre-computed Tables

```{r load_data}
# Summary pivot tables (from 04_process_results.py)
scenario_egfr_pivot <- read.csv('results/tables/egfr_scenario_summary.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
scenario_dgf_pivot <- read.csv('results/tables/dgf_scenario_summary.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
method_egfr_pivot <- read.csv('results/tables/egfr_method_summary.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
method_dgf_pivot <- read.csv('results/tables/dgf_method_summary.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

# Improvement tables
egfr_improve_by_model <- read.csv('results/tables/egfr_improvement_by_model.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
dgf_improve_by_model <- read.csv('results/tables/dgf_improvement_by_model.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

# CKD distribution and permutation importance
ckd_distribution <- read.csv('results/tables/ckd_stage_distribution.csv')
egfr_importance <- read.csv('results/tables/egfr_permutation_importance.csv')
dgf_importance <- read.csv('results/tables/dgf_permutation_importance.csv')

cat("Loaded all pre-computed tables from results/tables/\n")
```

---

# Scenario Heatmap - eGFR

```{r scenario_heatmap_egfr, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
melt_data <- scenario_egfr_pivot %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Scenario", values_to = "Test_MSE") %>%
  mutate(Scenario = factor(Scenario, levels = colnames(scenario_egfr_pivot)),
         MSE_rank = rank(Test_MSE))

ggplot(melt_data, aes(x = Scenario, y = Model, fill = MSE_rank)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Test_MSE, 0)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = -1, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "eGFR Test MSE by Model and Scenario",
       subtitle = "(Lower/Lighter = Better, colors by rank)",
       x = "Scenario", y = "Model") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
```

---

# Scenario Heatmap - DGF

```{r scenario_heatmap_dgf, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
melt_data <- scenario_dgf_pivot %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Scenario", values_to = "Test_AUC") %>%
  mutate(Scenario = factor(Scenario, levels = colnames(scenario_dgf_pivot)))

ggplot(melt_data, aes(x = Scenario, y = Model, fill = Test_AUC)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Test_AUC)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = 1, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "DGF Test AUC by Model and Scenario",
       subtitle = "(Higher = Better)",
       x = "Scenario", y = "Model", fill = "Test AUC") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
```

---

# Method Heatmap - eGFR

```{r method_heatmap_egfr, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
melt_data <- method_egfr_pivot %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  filter(Model != "Ridge", Model != "Lasso") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Method", values_to = "Test_MSE") %>%
  mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = colnames(method_egfr_pivot)),
         MSE_rank = rank(Test_MSE))

ggplot(melt_data, aes(x = Method, y = Model, fill = MSE_rank)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Test_MSE, 0)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = -1, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "eGFR Test MSE by Model and Harmonization Method",
       subtitle = "(Lower = Better, colors by rank)",
       x = "Harmonization Method", y = "Model") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
```

---

# Method Heatmap - DGF

```{r method_heatmap_dgf, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
melt_data <- method_dgf_pivot %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Method", values_to = "Test_AUC") %>%
  mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = colnames(method_dgf_pivot)))

ggplot(melt_data, aes(x = Method, y = Model, fill = Test_AUC)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Test_AUC)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
  labs(title = "DGF Test AUC by Model and Harmonization Method",
       subtitle = "(Higher = Better)",
       x = "Harmonization Method", y = "Model", fill = "Test AUC") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
```

---

# Average Performance by Scenario

```{r avg_performance_scenario, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
scenario_egfr_avg <- colMeans(scenario_egfr_pivot, na.rm = TRUE)
scenario_dgf_avg <- colMeans(scenario_dgf_pivot, na.rm = TRUE)

egfr_df <- data.frame(
  Scenario = factor(names(scenario_egfr_avg), levels = names(scenario_egfr_avg)),
  avg = scenario_egfr_avg
) %>% mutate(is_best = avg == min(avg))

dgf_df <- data.frame(
  Scenario = factor(names(scenario_dgf_avg), levels = names(scenario_dgf_avg)),
  avg = scenario_dgf_avg
) %>% mutate(is_best = avg == max(avg))

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_df, aes(x = Scenario, y = avg, fill = is_best)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg, 0)), vjust = -0.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#3498db", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_sqrt() +
  labs(title = "eGFR: Average Test MSE by Scenario",
       subtitle = "(Lower = Better, sqrt scale)",
       x = "Scenario", y = "Average Test MSE (sqrt scale)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_df, aes(x = Scenario, y = avg, fill = is_best)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", avg)), vjust = -0.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#3498db", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(title = "DGF: Average Test AUC by Scenario",
       subtitle = "(Higher = Better)",
       x = "Scenario", y = "Average Test AUC") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```

---

# Average Performance by Method

```{r avg_performance_method, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
method_egfr_avg <- colMeans(method_egfr_pivot, na.rm = TRUE)
method_dgf_avg <- colMeans(method_dgf_pivot, na.rm = TRUE)

egfr_df <- data.frame(
  Method = factor(names(method_egfr_avg), levels = names(method_egfr_avg)),
  avg = method_egfr_avg
) %>% mutate(is_best = avg == min(avg))

dgf_df <- data.frame(
  Method = factor(names(method_dgf_avg), levels = names(method_dgf_avg)),
  avg = method_dgf_avg
) %>% mutate(is_best = avg == max(avg))

unharm_mse <- method_egfr_avg["Unharmonized"]
unharm_auc <- method_dgf_avg["Unharmonized"]

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_df, aes(x = Method, y = avg, fill = is_best)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg, 0)), vjust = -0.5, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = unharm_mse, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#3498db", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "eGFR: Average Test MSE by Method",
       subtitle = "(Lower = Better)",
       x = "Harmonization Method", y = "Average Test MSE") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_df, aes(x = Method, y = avg, fill = is_best)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", avg)), vjust = -0.5, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = unharm_auc, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#3498db", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(title = "DGF: Average Test AUC by Method",
       subtitle = "(Higher = Better)",
       x = "Harmonization Method", y = "Average Test AUC") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```

---

# Improvement Over Unharmonized

```{r improvement_over_unharmonized, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
method_egfr_avg <- colMeans(method_egfr_pivot, na.rm = TRUE)
method_dgf_avg <- colMeans(method_dgf_pivot, na.rm = TRUE)

unharm_mse <- method_egfr_avg["Unharmonized"]
unharm_auc <- method_dgf_avg["Unharmonized"]

egfr_improve <- data.frame(
  Method = names(method_egfr_avg),
  avg = method_egfr_avg
) %>%
  filter(Method != "Unharmonized") %>%
  mutate(
    Method = factor(Method, levels = Method),
    improvement = ((unharm_mse - avg) / unharm_mse) * 100
  )

dgf_improve <- data.frame(
  Method = names(method_dgf_avg),
  avg = method_dgf_avg
) %>%
  filter(Method != "Unharmonized") %>%
  mutate(
    Method = factor(Method, levels = Method),
    improvement = ((avg - unharm_auc) / unharm_auc) * 100
  )

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_improve, aes(x = Method, y = improvement, fill = improvement > 0)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f%%", improvement)),
            vjust = ifelse(egfr_improve$improvement >= 0, -0.5, 1.5), fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#e74c3c", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "eGFR: % Improvement Over Unharmonized",
       subtitle = "(Positive = Better)",
       x = "Harmonization Method", y = "% Improvement in Test MSE") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_improve, aes(x = Method, y = improvement, fill = improvement > 0)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f%%", improvement)),
            vjust = ifelse(dgf_improve$improvement >= 0, -0.5, 1.5), fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#e74c3c", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "DGF: % Improvement Over Unharmonized",
       subtitle = "(Positive = Better)",
       x = "Harmonization Method", y = "% Improvement in Test AUC") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```

---

# Improvement by Model

```{r improvement_by_model, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
methods_to_compare <- colnames(egfr_improve_by_model)

egfr_improve_long <- egfr_improve_by_model %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Method", values_to = "Improvement") %>%
  mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = methods_to_compare))

dgf_improve_long <- dgf_improve_by_model %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Method", values_to = "Improvement") %>%
  mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = methods_to_compare))

method_colors <- c('#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12', '#9b59b6', '#e74c3c')

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_improve_long, aes(x = Model, y = Improvement, fill = Method)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(method_colors[1:length(methods_to_compare)], methods_to_compare)) +
  labs(title = "eGFR: % Improvement Over Unharmonized by Model",
       subtitle = "(Positive = Better)",
       x = "Model", y = "% Improvement in Test MSE", fill = "Method") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_improve_long, aes(x = Model, y = Improvement, fill = Method)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(method_colors[1:length(methods_to_compare)], methods_to_compare)) +
  labs(title = "DGF: % Improvement Over Unharmonized by Model",
       subtitle = "(Positive = Better)",
       x = "Model", y = "% Improvement in Test AUC", fill = "Method") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, nrow = 2)
```

---

# CKD Stage Distribution

```{r ckd_stage_distribution, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
ckd_long <- ckd_distribution %>%
  pivot_longer(-CKD_Stage, names_to = "Category", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(
    CKD_Stage = factor(CKD_Stage, levels = ckd_distribution$CKD_Stage),
    Set = ifelse(grepl("Train", Category), "Training", "Test"),
    Type = ifelse(grepl("Actual", Category), "Actual", "Predicted")
  )

train_data <- ckd_long %>% filter(Set == "Training")
test_data <- ckd_long %>% filter(Set == "Test")

p1 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = CKD_Stage, y = Count, fill = Type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actual" = "#3498db", "Predicted" = "#e74c3c")) +
  labs(title = "Training Set: CKD Stage Distribution",
       subtitle = "(XGBoost on ComBat Harmonized Data)",
       x = "CKD Stage", y = "Count", fill = "") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

p2 <- ggplot(test_data, aes(x = CKD_Stage, y = Count, fill = Type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actual" = "#3498db", "Predicted" = "#e74c3c")) +
  labs(title = "Test Set: CKD Stage Distribution",
       subtitle = "(XGBoost on ComBat Harmonized Data)",
       x = "CKD Stage", y = "Count", fill = "") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```

---

# Permutation Importance

```{r permutation_importance, fig.width=16, fig.height=8}
top_n <- 20

egfr_imp <- egfr_importance %>%
  head(top_n) %>%
  mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = rev(Feature)))

dgf_imp <- dgf_importance %>%
  head(top_n) %>%
  mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = rev(Feature)))

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_imp, aes(x = Importance, y = Feature)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#3498db", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = sprintf("eGFR: Top %d Features", top_n),
       subtitle = "(Permutation Importance, XGBoost)",
       x = "Importance (L1 Normalized)", y = "") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_imp, aes(x = Importance, y = Feature)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#e74c3c", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = sprintf("DGF: Top %d Features", top_n),
       subtitle = "(Permutation Importance, XGBoost)",
       x = "Importance (L1 Normalized)", y = "") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```
